name: What's average settlement slip and fall work injury Utah?

mainEntity.name: What's average settlement slip and fall work injury Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Averages $20k-$50k for moderate injuries, higher for surgery/permanent disability via compromise.** Varies widely by facts.[1] Key factors: (1) Wage loss multiplies; (2) Impairment rating key; (3) No caps on comp. Get personalized eval. Attorney negotiates max.
